user.title: RENAC Power
user.description: Enter your RENAC account credentials. Station ID and User ID will be discovered automatically.

station.title: RENAC Power — Select Station
station.description: Stations found in your account. Select the one you want to add.

manual.title: RENAC Power — Manual Setup
manual.description: Could not discover stations automatically. Enter the IDs manually (check the requests in the RENAC app/web).

error.cannot_connect: Could not authenticate or connect to the RENAC API.

abort.already_configured: This RENAC station is already configured.
